headline: Gap's Positive Comps Streak: Near-Term Strength or Peak Cycle?

headline: FIVE Stock Up 7% After Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Comps Rise Y/Y
summary: Five Below jumps 7.3% after Q4 beats as sales rise 24% and comps climb 15.4%, driven by strong traffic, merchandising gains and cost discipline.
